name: Huaxi Holdings Company Limited
summary: Huaxi Holdings Company Limited, an investment holding company, manufactures and sells cigarette-related packaging materials in the People's Republic of China. The company offers inner frame, cigarette box frame, and tipping papers, as well as cigarette trade mark labels, cigarette paper boxes, and other products. It is also involved in biological technology research and related products trading activities; and provision of environmental treatment services, and agricultural science and technology related services. The company was founded in 1992 and is based in Central, Hong Kong.
